name: capsicum annuum
title: capsicum annuum benefits
description: Capsicum annuum has antioxidant properties, which refer to its ability to neutralize or mop up free radicals that can cause oxidative stress and damage to cells in the body. This benefit is important because it can help protect against chronic diseases such as cancer, heart disease, and neurodegenerative disorders, and may also reduce the risk of certain types of cancer, including colon, lung, and breast cancer.
